# Summary Table (ST) — Report

**Role:** Midwife (RHM)
**Purpose:** End-of-month auto-generated aggregation of all VALIDATED TCL records for the BHS and reporting period. The ST maps individual patient-level data from all TCLs to FHSIS indicator codes, disaggregated by sex and NHTS status. This is the core output of the Zero-Tally architecture — no manual counting required.
**FHSIS Reference:** FHSIS MOP 2018, Chapter 2 (forms overview) + Chapters 4-6 (each program cluster defines its ST columns)
**Who fills it:** Auto-generated by the tally engine from validated TCL data. Midwife reviews, optionally adds remarks, and submits.
**Who reviews/approves it:** PHN reviews submitted STs during MCT consolidation.
**Frequency:** Monthly. Generated at end of month; submitted by Monday of the 1st week of the succeeding month.
**Storage location:** `summary_tables` table (one row per BHS per month)

---

## Required Fields

### ST Header

| Field Name | Data Type | Constraints / Validation Rules | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:-------------------------------|:------|
| `st_id` | UUID | System-generated | |
| `health_station_id` | UUID | FK to `health_stations`. Auto-populated from midwife's session. | |
| `health_station_name` | String | Display | |
| `reporting_period_month` | Integer | 1-12 | |
| `reporting_period_year` | Integer | | |
| `generated_at` | Timestamp | System-generated | When the tally engine ran |
| `generated_by` | UUID | Midwife user ID | |
| `status` | Enum | `DRAFT`, `SUBMITTED` | Locked after submission |

### Pre-flight Check Data (displayed before generation)

| Field Name | Data Type | Constraints / Validation Rules | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:-------------------------------|:------|
| `validated_record_count` | Integer | Count of VALIDATED records for the period, per TCL | |
| `returned_records_outstanding` | Integer | Count of RETURNED records still not resubmitted | Warning if > 0 |
| `pending_validation_count` | Integer | Count of PENDING_VALIDATION records | Warning if > 0 |

### ST Body — Indicator Rows

Each row in the ST represents one FHSIS indicator. The tally engine computes these automatically.

| Field Name | Data Type | Constraints / Validation Rules | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:-------------------------------|:------|
| `indicator_code` | String | FHSIS standard code. Must match DOH DM 2024-0007 exactly. | e.g., `MAT_ANC4`, `EPI_FIC`, `NCD_HPN_NEW` |
| `indicator_name` | String | FHSIS standard name. Do not rename. | |
| `program_cluster` | Enum | `Maternal`, `Child`, `NCD`, `Infectious Disease` | Groups indicators |
| `numerator_nhts` | Integer | Count of NHTS clients meeting the indicator | |
| `numerator_non_nhts` | Integer | Count of Non-NHTS clients | |
| `numerator_total` | Integer | Auto-computed: NHTS + Non-NHTS | |
| `denominator` | Integer | Per FHSIS formula (e.g., Total Pop x 2.056% for maternal) | |
| `coverage_percent` | Decimal | Auto-computed: (numerator_total / denominator) x 100 | |
| `remark` | Text | Optional. Free text per indicator row. | Midwife can add context |

### ST Footer

| Field Name | Data Type | Constraints / Validation Rules | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:-------------------------------|:------|
| `midwife_name` | String | Auto-populated from session | |
| `submission_date` | Date | Set on submit | |

---

## Optional / Conditional Fields

| Field Name | Data Type | Condition for Display | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:----------------------|:------|
| `remark` | Text | Optional per indicator row | Midwife may add context |
| Sex disaggregation columns | Integer | For child care and NCD indicators that require sex breakdown | Auto-computed |
| Age group disaggregation | Integer | For maternal indicators (10-14, 15-19, 20-49) | Auto-computed |

---

## Enums / Controlled Vocabularies

| Enum | Values |
|:-----|:-------|
| `status` | `DRAFT`, `SUBMITTED` |
| `program_cluster` | `Maternal`, `Child`, `NCD`, `Infectious Disease` |

### FHSIS Indicator Codes (subset — full list from DOH DM 2024-0007)

**Maternal Care:**
- `MAT_ANC4` — Pregnant women with >= 4 ANC check-ups
- `MAT_BMI_NORMAL` — Pregnant women with normal BMI (1st trimester)
- `MAT_TD_1ST` — First pregnancy Td immunization (2 doses)
- `MAT_TD_2PLUS` — 2nd+ pregnancy Td immunization (3+ doses)
- `MAT_IFA` — Iron with Folic Acid supplementation
- `MAT_CALCIUM` — Calcium Carbonate supplementation
- `MAT_IODINE` — Iodine capsule
- `MAT_DEWORM` — Deworming
- `MAT_SYPHILIS` — Syphilis screening
- `MAT_HEPB` — Hepatitis B screening
- `MAT_HIV` — HIV screening
- `MAT_CBC` — CBC/Hgb screening
- `MAT_GD` — Gestational diabetes screening
- `MAT_FBD` — Facility-based delivery
- `MAT_SBA` — Skilled birth attendant delivery
- `MAT_PP2` — >= 2 postpartum check-ups
- `MAT_PP_VITA` — Postpartum Vitamin A
- `MAT_PP_IFA` — Postpartum Iron with Folic Acid

**Child Care:**
- `EPI_BCG` — BCG vaccination
- `EPI_HEPB_BIRTH` — HepB birth dose
- `EPI_DPT3` — DPT-HiB-HepB 3 doses
- `EPI_OPV3` — OPV 3 doses
- `EPI_IPV` — IPV
- `EPI_PCV3` — PCV 3 doses
- `EPI_MCV1` — MCV at 9 months
- `EPI_MCV2` — MCV at 12 months
- `EPI_FIC` — Fully Immunized Child
- `EPI_CIC` — Completely Immunized Child
- `NUT_BF_INIT` — Breastfeeding initiation
- `NUT_EBF` — Exclusive breastfeeding
- `NUT_VITA_INF` — Vitamin A (6-11 months)
- `NUT_VITA_U5` — Vitamin A (12-59 months, 2 doses)
- `NUT_MNP` — MNP supplementation
- `NUT_STATUS` — Nutritional status distribution (0-59 months)
- `NUT_LBW_IRON` — LBW infants given iron
- `DEW_PSAC` — Deworming PSAC (2 doses)

**NCD:**
- `NCD_PHILPEN` — Adults 20+ risk-assessed
- `NCD_HPN_NEW` — Newly identified hypertensives
- `NCD_DM_NEW` — Newly identified diabetics
- `NCD_CERVICAL` — Cervical cancer screening
- `NCD_BREAST_REF` — Breast mass referred
- `NCD_VA` — Visual acuity screening (SC)
- `NCD_PPV` — PPV vaccine (SC)
- `NCD_FLU` — Influenza vaccine (SC)

**Infectious Disease (TB):**
- `TB_DSTB_ENROLLED` — DS-TB cases enrolled
- `TB_TSR` — DS-TB Treatment Success Rate
- `TB_DRTB_ENROLLED` — DR-TB cases enrolled

---

## UX / Clinical Safety Concerns

- **Pre-flight check screen:** Before generating the ST, display:
  - Count of VALIDATED records per TCL for the period
  - Count of RETURNED records still outstanding (with patient names)
  - Count of PENDING_VALIDATION records still outstanding
  - Option: "Resolve outstanding" or "Proceed with current validated data"
- **ST Preview:** After generation, display the full ST as a table with indicator name, numerator (NHTS/Non-NHTS), denominator, coverage %. Allow the midwife to review before submitting.
- **Print preview:** The ST must be printable (PDF export) in a format matching the DOH ST form layout.
- **Locked after submission:** Once submitted (`SUBMITTED`), the midwife cannot edit the ST. Any corrections require PHN to return it (not implemented in Phase 2 — flag as future feature).
- **Remark field:** Per-indicator optional remark for the midwife to explain anomalies (e.g., "Low coverage due to BHS closure for 2 weeks").
- **Coverage % alerts:** Highlight indicators where coverage exceeds 100% (data quality issue — per Ch. 9.1 validation rules) or is significantly below target.
- **Audit trail:** ST generation and submission create `audit_logs` entries.

---

## Database Schema Notes

- **Table:** `summary_tables` — one row per BHS per month. FK to `health_station_id`.
- **Indicator rows:** Child table `st_indicators(id, st_id, indicator_code, indicator_name, program_cluster, numerator_nhts, numerator_non_nhts, numerator_total, denominator, coverage_percent, remark)`.
- **Status:** `status ENUM('DRAFT', 'SUBMITTED')`. Immutable after `SUBMITTED`.
- **Tally engine:** Server-side function that queries all VALIDATED records in the TCL tables for the BHS + period, computes indicator numerators, and inserts `st_indicators` rows.
- **Denominator source:** Population denominators come from `health_stations.estimated_population` or a separate demographics reference table.
- **Audit log:** INSERT on generation and submission.
- **Indexes:** `summary_tables(health_station_id, reporting_period_year, reporting_period_month)`.
- **No soft delete:** STs are immutable reports. They are never deleted — only superseded if regenerated before submission.
